options.name: <resistance_value>
options.description: Specifies the value for the wire resistance

options.name: <net_list>
options.description: Specifies a list of nets on which the wire resistance is set

options.name: -max
options.description: Specifies that the asserted resistance is the maximum resistance

options.name: -min
options.description: Specifies that the asserted resistance is the minimum resistance
